headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' vercel.com *.vercel.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' *.googleapis.com vercel.com *.vercel.com; font-src 'self' fonts.gstatic.com *.vercel-storage.com data:; img-src 'self' data: https:; connect-src 'self' https: wss:; frame-ancestors 'self';
